title: Romantic hotels in Buenos Aires province

currency.note: Conversion rate used for ARS-quoted tariffs

criteria: Outside Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires
Upper-class / non-mass-market romantic by EU–US taste: Relais & Châteaux, historic estancias, polo clubs, adults spa resorts, small town boutiques
Google Maps rating above 3.9 (3.9 and below excluded)

excluded.name: Hotel San Carlos (Areco)
excluded.reason: High-volume spa hotel; too mass-market for this list

excluded.name: La Posta del Pilar
excluded.reason: Suburban spa hotel; not upper-class romantic

excluded.name: Elevage General Rodriguez Resort
excluded.reason: Weak official web presence; aggregator listings only

excluded.name: City hotels in CABA (Faena, Four Seasons, etc.)

factors.pedigree: 0–30: Relais & Châteaux, historic palace, luxury-press shortlist, owner boutique, spa resort
factors.setting: 0–25: private campo/palace/delta water > polo lawns > historic town > spa grounds
factors.coupleFit: 0–20: adults-only / couple design > quiet min-age > family tourist estancia / sports resort

romanceRubric.note: Scores are editorial, not Google ratings. Default page sort uses romance.score descending.

hotels.name: Estancia La Bamba de Areco
hotels.sourceName: Estancia La Bamba de Areco - Relais & Chateaux -
hotels.fullAddress: Ruta 31 Km 7.5, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Early-19th-century Relais & Châteaux estancia with 11 rooms, polo lawns and full-board stays. The usual pick when someone wants the Pampas version of a European country-house hotel.

price.source: Tripadvisor / Mr & Mrs Smith listed from-rates
price.note: From-rate for a standard room; dates swing hard.

romance.why: Relais & Châteaux country house with 11 rooms. Closest thing on this list to a European château weekend.

hotels.name: Estancia Villa María
hotels.fullAddress: Av. Pereda S/N, B1812 Máximo Paz, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Tudor-Norman casco on parkland about 45–60 minutes south of the city. Eleven rooms in the main house plus a French house annex; rates are per person, full board, with horses and park walks included.

price.note: Converted from ARS 360,000 + IVA per person, base double. Suites run higher.

romance.why: Tudor-Norman palace in parkland; the classic BA romantic campo overnight, even if the room count is higher than a Relais.

hotels.name: La Becasina Delta Lodge
hotels.fullAddress: Arroyo Las Canas, Delta, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Fifteen river cabins on Arroyo Las Cañas, boat-access only from the San Fernando / Tigre side. Guests must be 14 or older. Private decks on the water, not a city boutique with a delta hashtag.

price.note: Package price for double occupancy; confirm current season on labecasina.com.

romance.why: Private river cabins, boat-only, 14+. Water seclusion reads as romantic in EU/US taste the way a lake lodge does.

hotels.name: Casa Bora Hotel
hotels.fullAddress: Domingo Faustino Sarmiento 175, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Four-suite boutique in Areco's historic center, opened by a couple who left Villa Crespo after years of hotel-hopping abroad. Two rooms have private mini-pools; La Nación clocked weekend doubles from ARS 175,000 in early 2025.

price.note: Converted from ARS 175,000 weekend double quoted in La Nación.

romance.why: Four suites, couple-built, two with private mini-pools. Town, not campo, but the scale and intent are right.

hotels.name: Estancia La Sofía
hotels.sourceName: Estancia La Sofia - Boutique Hotel & Polo Ranch
hotels.fullAddress: Cuartel VI, Azcuénaga, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Six-suite colonial-style polo ranch about 100 km from Buenos Aires. Owner-run, full-board leaning, with polo lessons if you want them and a pool if you do not.

price.includes: Check whether quoted rate is room or per person
price.note: Site showed from US$532 at research time.

romance.why: Six-suite owner polo ranch. Small enough to feel private; polo is optional, not the whole pitch.

hotels.name: Mestizo Hotel
hotels.fullAddress: Provincia de Santa Cruz 1505, B6070 Lincoln, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Six-room 4-star boutique on the edge of Lincoln with a garden, seasonal pool, restaurant/teahouse and spa baths in some rooms. Farther than Areco (~4.5 hours), but the scale is couple-weekend sized.

price.includes: OTA average for a standard room
price.note: Tripadvisor showed roughly $109–$157 for a standard room; confirm live rates.

romance.why: Six rooms, garden quiet and spa baths — intimate boutique register. Loses points for distance from BA and no Relais/palace pedigree.

hotels.name: Estancia La Bandada
hotels.fullAddress: 35°28'46.9"S 58°41'56, RP41 km 120, 7220 San Miguel del Monte, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Former Candelaria del Monte, now La Bandada: a 200-acre working farm about 90 minutes from Buenos Aires. The South America Specialists and The Telegraph still list it for a quiet Pampas night without Relais pricing.

price.note: No stable public from-rate found at build time.

romance.why: Quiet working farm on UK shortlists (Telegraph / South America Specialists). Low key, not a spa machine.

hotels.name: Estancia El Rosario de Areco
hotels.fullAddress: RP41, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Low-key polo estancia outside Areco with rooms converted from old stables and a pool under the trees. Feels more private house than hotel, which is the point.

price.note: Book by email; no public rate card scraped.

romance.why: Stable rooms and a private-house feel outside Areco. More hideaway than hotel lobby.

hotels.name: Posada de la Plaza
hotels.fullAddress: Alvear 480, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Late-19th-century house on Plaza Gómez with a handful of rooms and breakfast included. Walk-to-everything Areco stay if you want town streets at night instead of a dark campo driveway.

price.note: Book on site; breakfast included, no public USD card.

romance.why: Late-19th-century house on the plaza. Romantic if you want Areco streets at night; less so if you want silence and horses.

hotels.name: Estancia El Ombú de Areco
hotels.fullAddress: Ruta 31 Cuartel VI, Villa Lía, San Antorio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: 1880 mansion on a working ranch near Areco. Meals are included; the look is rustic-chic rather than Relais polish, and it still reads as a proper campo stay rather than a highway motel with a gaucho mural.

romance.why: Real 1880 ranch stay with meals included. Solid campo, a bit more tourist-estancia than private house.

hotels.name: Puesto Viejo Estancia & Polo Club
hotels.fullAddress: RP6 Km. 82, B1814 Cañuelas, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Ten-room polo estancia on Ruta 6, roughly an hour from town and half an hour from Ezeiza. Covered by Condé Nast Traveler; the draw is polo fields plus a small hotel, not a mega-resort.

price.note: Packages vary; day-use and overnight sold separately.

romance.why: CN Traveler polo club with 10 rooms. Chic if you like polo; the sport energy undercuts pure couple quiet.

hotels.name: Pampas de Areco Hotel & Spa
hotels.fullAddress: Ruta 41 kilometro 271, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Neocolonial spa hotel with 30 rooms, adults only (18+), about 90 minutes from Buenos Aires. Spa Aguaribay does couple packages; this is the polished spa weekend rather than a working estancia.

price.note: OTA from-rate; spa and half-board packages cost more.

romance.why: Adults-only spa with couple packages. Polished weekend hotel, not a country house.

hotels.name: El Metejón Polo Resort
hotels.fullAddress: Officina, Colectora, Au Ezeiza - Cañuelas km 51,5, B1808 vicente casares, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Polo club and resort near Vicente Casares, close to Ezeiza. Built around lessons and matches more than spa rituals; useful if one of you actually wants to get on a horse properly.

romance.why: Polo lessons resort near Ezeiza. Fine for a shared hobby trip; weak as a pure romantic default.

hotels.name: Un Alto en la Huella
hotels.sourceName: Un Alto en la Huella - Hotel Spa & Wellness Resort
hotels.fullAddress: Cam. Ricardo Güiraldes 465, B2760 San Antonio de Areco, Provincia de Buenos Aires, Argentina
hotels.description: Spa hotel on the edge of Areco, 12+ only, with heated pool and Spa La Aguada. Closer to a wellness weekend than a polo fantasy; still quiet enough for a proper couple of nights out of the city.

price.source: Cloudbeds booking link on hotel site
price.note: Live rates on Cloudbeds; no fixed from-rate published.

romance.why: Wellness spa on the edge of Areco. Quiet and clean, but the register is detox, not dinner-and-fireplace.
